content.problemStatement:
Ashi had been given an array AAA having NNN element and you are asked QQQ queries of 333 types.

111 XXX :- If the array element at index XXX is even, then move it to the beginning of the array, otherwise move it to the end of the array (if the element is moved to the beginning then all numbers behind the index XXX will be shifted one position right to their initial positions and if it is moved to the end then all elements after the index XXX will move one position left to their initial positions.)

For example, if the array is A=[1,2,3,4,5]A=[1, 2, 3, 4, 5]A=[1,2,3,4,5] and after moving of 4th4^{th}4th element to the beginning, the changed array will be A=[4,1,2,3,5]A=[4, 1, 2, 3, 5]A=[4,1,2,3,5].

222 XXX PPP :- Change element of the array at index XXX to PPP

333 LLL RRR KKK :- Find the count of numbers of the array AAA from index LLL to RRR (including both LLL and RRR) having KKK set bits.

###Input


The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and QQQ, the number of elements in the array AAA, and the number of queries.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers of the array AAA.
Next QQQ lines contain two, there, or four space-separated integers according to the type of query, the first integer will represent the type of query.
constraints: For 3rd3^{rd}3rd query : there are 222 numbers(666 and 101010) in the range 111 to 444 which have 222 set bits.
content.outputFormat: For each query of type 333 print the required number in a new line.
